ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani, via zoom, for Tokuko Haskell, Petitioner.

The court and Mr. Mitani discuss the intricacies of this matter and how difficult it has been for Mr. Mitani due to some of the heirs living in Japan. After additional discussion, the court finds that the parties have been diligent enough to grant the petition and no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-23-2007 is admitted to probate. Tokuko T. Haskell is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-10-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Continued To Mar-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To Mar-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Continued To Jan-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

Mr. Mitani stated that the niece indicated that the nephew passed away eleven years ago, and that the brother is non-responsive, or the address is not correct. The court stated that it is going to allow a little more time for Mr. Mitani to do a search to find the brother in Japan. Mr. Mitani stated that they started the process, but they haven't gotten anyone to help them, that the first person they found refused to do it and that they are trying to find another one. Mr. Mitani also stated that they don't have the authority to get any records and that Japan is very strict on privacy. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to January 31, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Mitani to continue conducting a search.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
